signals.message: M6 is the final launch milestone. Deploy seeneyu to Vercel.
M6 is COMPLETE. App is live at https://seeneyu.vercel.app. All env vars set, DB seeded. No further action needed.

PM session complete (2026-03-22). Project status: M0–M8 COMPLETE, deployed to https://seeneyu.vercel.app. Phase 7-marketing active. New code from M7+M8 (auth system, admin CMS) needs to be deployed to production. User action required: (1) Add NEXTAUTH_SECRET and NEXTAUTH_URL to Vercel env vars. (2) Re-deploy: vercel --prod --yes. (3) Run db:push to apply new auth schema models to Neon. (4) Run admin:create to seed first admin account. When ready, signal PM and Tester.

PM context window is at ~90% — session restart is imminent. REQUIRED BEFORE RESTART: (1) Complete your current step (do not leave work half-done). (2) Update your progress/checkpoint file in .shared/outputs/<your-role>/. (3) Write a "checkpoint-saved" signal to pm.json listing what you finished and what is next. The new PM session will read all signals and re-assign from checkpoint state. Your .shared/outputs/<role>/progress.json is the source of truth for recovery.
